title: ISRO VSSC Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 03 Authorised Medical Officer Jobs
description: The ISRO Vikram Sarabhai Space Centre (ISRO VSSC) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 03 Authorised Medical Officers and Dermatologist Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MBBS, BHMS, PGDM, MD/MS, DNB can apply for the ISRO VSSC Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in offline mode.
